title: Bundles
subtitle: Manage reusable collections of features, prompts, and resources

explainer.body: Each Space gets one auto-created Default set. Routing is decided per reported folder via Workspaces — sessions whose root isn't bound fall back to the default Space's Default set.

empty.noMatchTitle: No feature sets match your search
empty.noCreatedDesc: Create a feature set to group tools and resources together for easy access control.

card.starterBadgeTitle: Auto-seeded with this Space. Edit, rename, or delete freely — no special routing role; bindings and per-client grants pick FeatureSets explicitly.

panel.starterTitle: Auto-created with this Space. Edit, rename, or delete freely — no special routing role.
panel.starterNoteBody: auto-created with this Space. It's an ordinary FeatureSet — edit, rename, or delete it freely. No special routing role: Workspace bindings and per-client grants pick FeatureSets explicitly.
panel.noFeaturesMatch: No features found matching your search
panel.surfaceToolTitle: Promote this included tool into the client tools/list for direct one-hop calls. The checkbox only grants invoke access via search + mcpmux_invoke_tool—it does not add the tool to tools/list.
panel.surfaceResourceTitle: Promote this included resource into the client resources/list for direct one-hop reads. The checkbox only grants read access via search + mcpmux_read_resource—it does not add the resource to resources/list.
panel.surfacePromptTitle: Promote this included prompt into the client prompts/list for direct one-hop fetches. The checkbox only grants fetch access via search + mcpmux_fetch_prompt—it does not add the prompt to prompts/list.
